name: Recraft MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Recraft MCP server enabling AI agents to use Recraft's AI design and image generation platform — creating high-quality images, illustrations, icons, and vector graphics from text prompts; generating brand-consistent visuals with style controls; creating SVG and raster images; and integrating professional AI design capabilities into agent-driven creative workflows.
use_cases: Generating professional illustrations and vector graphics from design agents
Creating brand-consistent visuals with Recraft's style controls from marketing agents
Producing icons and UI elements from product design agents
Generating SVG graphics programmatically from technical design agents
Creating marketing materials and visual content from content creation agents
Iterating on design concepts with AI from creative workflow agents
not_for: Photo-realistic image generation (Recraft specializes in illustrations and design, not photorealism)
Teams needing pixel-perfect control over designs (use professional design tools for that)
High-volume generation without verifying API rate limits and costs
best_when: A design or marketing agent needs professional-quality illustrations, icons, or vector graphics — Recraft specializes in design-quality AI image generation with better style consistency than general text-to-image models.
avoid_when: You need photorealistic images — use DALL-E 3 or Stable Diffusion for photorealism. Recraft excels at design/illustration styles.

auth.notes: Recraft API token required. Set RECRAFT_API_TOKEN environment variable. Get token from recraft.ai account. Usage-based billing tied to token.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Recraft free credits for new accounts
pricing.paid_tiers: Credits-based: $0.04-0.25/image depending on quality and type; subscription plans available
pricing.notes: Credits-based pricing. Free credits for new accounts. SVG generation costs more than raster. Monitor credit usage in agent loops. Official MCP from recraft-ai org.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits by plan; generation is inherently slow (seconds per image)

known_agent_gotchas: Image generation is slow (3-15 seconds) — agents must wait with appropriate timeouts
Style parameters are specific to Recraft's style system — learn available styles before prompting
Generated images are non-deterministic — same prompt produces different results
SVG output quality may vary — test before relying on for production assets
Credits deplete with each generation — implement budget monitoring for agent loops
Official MCP from recraft-ai — well-documented, high quality
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Recraft EU data residency (GDPR-friendly). Keep API token secure — usage-based billing means leaks are costly. Prompts processed by Recraft — don't include sensitive data.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. EU data residency. Official recraft-ai MCP. Keep token secure. Credits-based billing — token leaks are costly.
